name: write_bxn
short_description: Export the current netlist as binary netlist
full_help:
write_bxn

Description: 
Export the current netlist as binary netlist

Syntax: 
write_bxn  [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
the name of the output file

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-force]    Overwrite existing file
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>      Output file

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
